# ASCO Power Technologies

ASCO Power Technologies is a critical power switching specialist focused on automatic transfer switches, paralleling controls, and resilient facility power paths.

## Why it matters
- Adds a missing hard-power realism anchor between generation and downstream distribution.
- Makes failover, redundancy, and switching logic more believable inside the deployment graph.
- Strengthens the power chain beyond generic switchgear references.

## Best fit
- Mission-critical environments where transfer logic is a first-order design concern.
- AI campuses combining generator-backed resilience with packaged power delivery.
- Operators evaluating uptime architecture, not just component counts.

## Operational role in the graph
- Deepens `ats-and-transfer-systems` directly.
- Connects `generators-and-microgrids`, `ups-and-battery-storage`, and `electrical-integration-services`.
- Helps the graph read like a site that can actually switch, isolate, and stay up under load transitions.
